title: Kainoor Shiva Temple
tagline: Kainoor Shiva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Kainoor Shiva Temple is located at Kainoor village in Thrissur district.
overview.description: Kainoor Shiva Temple is located at Kainoor village in Thrissur district. The temple preceding deity is Shiva in the sanctum sanctorum facing east. It is believed that this temple is one of the 108 Shiva temples of Kerala and is installed by sage Parasurama dedicated to Shiva. Maha Shivarathri festival of the temple celebrates in the Malayalam month of Kumbha (February - March).

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Puthur, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: Puthur is a village in the taluk of Thrissur in the Thrissur district of Kerala. It is the location for the upcoming Thrissur Zoological Park Wildlife Conservation & Research Centre park.

topPlaces.name: Bhavan's Vidya Mandir, Poochatty
topPlaces.description: Bhavan's Vidya Mandir, Poochatty is a private co-educational school located in Poochatty, Thrissur, Kerala, India. It is a part of the Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan trust and is affiliated to the Central Board of Secondary Education, Delhi.

topPlaces.name: Kuttanellur Heliport
topPlaces.description: Kuttanellur Heliport is a Government of Kerala-owned heliport located in Kuttanellur, in Thrissur city of Kerala, India. It can be used by giving advance notice to the Government of Kerala or by special permission.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kainoor Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kainoor Shiva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kainoor Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (41 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (59 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kainoor Shiva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kainoor Shiva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kainoor Shiva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kainoor Shiva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kainoor Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Puthur, Thrissur, Kozhukkully, Bhavan's Vidya Mandir, Poochatty, Mulayam, Kainoor.
